content: Can you check whether the repo is clean before changing anything?
Should I ask before running tests?
No, routine tests are fine. Ask only before destructive changes, spend, deploys, or credentials.
I will inspect the repo and run pytest.
The tests failed; I will read the traceback and fix the root cause.
Use Fable for strategy review after the pilot, not for every tiny code edit.
I found the repeated pattern: plan, test, implement, verify, then review.
